features.title: Claude API Connectivity Validation
features.description: Implement comprehensive health checks to validate Claude API connectivity and authentication status across all packages

tasks.title: Add Claude API connectivity test command
tasks.description: Create a dedicated command to test Claude API connectivity, validate authentication credentials, and report connection status with detailed error messages for troubleshooting
acceptanceCriteria: Command successfully connects to Claude API and reports status
Validates both CLI and API key authentication methods
Returns meaningful error messages for connection failures
Reports API rate limit status and usage information

tasks.title: Implement Claude API health monitoring in all packages
tasks.description: Add health check functionality to rex, hench, and sourcevision packages to validate Claude integration before executing operations that require API calls
acceptanceCriteria: Each package validates Claude connectivity before API-dependent operations
Health checks provide clear pass/fail status with error details
Packages gracefully handle API unavailability with helpful guidance
Health status is cached to avoid excessive API calls

tasks.title: Add Claude credential validation with detailed diagnostics
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive credential validation that checks API key format, permissions, and account status to provide actionable troubleshooting information
acceptanceCriteria: Validates API key format and structure
Checks API key permissions for required operations
Reports account status and usage limits
Provides specific guidance for credential setup issues

features.title: Claude CLI Health Checks
features.description: Validate Claude CLI installation and functionality to ensure proper integration with the development workflow

tasks.title: Implement Claude CLI installation detection
tasks.description: Create automated checks to detect if Claude CLI is properly installed, accessible in PATH, and at the correct version for compatibility with n-dx tooling
acceptanceCriteria: Detects Claude CLI installation and reports version
Validates CLI is accessible from current PATH
Checks version compatibility with n-dx requirements
Provides installation guidance when CLI is missing or outdated

tasks.title: Add Claude CLI functionality validation
tasks.description: Test core Claude CLI operations to ensure the CLI is properly configured and can execute essential commands needed by n-dx workflows
acceptanceCriteria: Validates Claude CLI can execute basic commands
Tests authentication status through CLI
Verifies CLI configuration is compatible with n-dx
Reports specific CLI issues with resolution steps

features.title: Integration Diagnostics Dashboard
features.description: Provide comprehensive diagnostics and monitoring interface for Claude integration health across the entire n-dx toolkit

tasks.title: Build Claude integration status dashboard
tasks.description: Create a unified dashboard that displays Claude integration health across all packages, showing connectivity status, authentication state, and usage metrics in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: Displays real-time Claude API connectivity status
Shows authentication state for both CLI and API methods
Reports usage metrics and rate limit status
Provides quick access to troubleshooting resources

tasks.title: Add comprehensive Claude integration test suite
tasks.description: Implement end-to-end testing that validates Claude integration across all n-dx packages and workflows to ensure reliable operation
acceptanceCriteria: Tests Claude integration in rex analyze workflow
Validates Claude functionality in hench execution
Tests sourcevision Claude-dependent operations
Runs integration tests with both authentication methods
